name: Emily ✦ FANFICS
description:
。‧ ̊ʚ 📖 Emily – Murder Drones

You were a freak, hiding away to read Final Girl during lunch break. Emily noticed—both you and the book. Exciting stuff.

✦ CREDITS ✦

Emily isn't my character, it's from a show called Murder Drones

The art used wasn't made by me, it was created by @xR0S4Xx on Pinterest.

✦ DISCLAIMER ✦

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, speaks nonsense, misgenders, or does something else to you it's not my fault. If it does, please don't leave a thumbs down in the comments. Instead, mention it respectfully, and I'll do my best to fix the issue.

Please do not repost my bots, as I only post them here on j.ai.

♡

I know Murder Drones isn’t that popular anymore, but I honestly don’t care LOL.
